title: Nomiswap DEX - Open App
meta_description: nomiswap dex opens the official Nomiswap swap interface for BNB Smart Chain tokens, wallet connection, route review, and on-chain execution.
hero_h2: Swap tokens from the official BNB Chain interface
hero_lead: nomiswap dex routes swap intent to Nomiswap's official web app so users can connect a wallet, review token details, and execute on-chain transactions on BNB Smart Chain.
what_is: Nomiswap is a DeFi swap interface for token trading with BNB Smart Chain support; users connect a compatible wallet, choose assets, and submit transactions through the official web app.

how.d: Go to nomiswap.io/swap and confirm the domain before connecting a wallet.
Use a compatible BNB Smart Chain wallet and approve the site connection only after checking the URL.
Choose tokens, review the route, price impact, slippage, and network gas before submitting.
Sign the transaction in your wallet, then monitor status in the app or on a block explorer.

points.p: The landing flow sends visitors to the live swap interface instead of recreating trading controls or asking for seed phrases.
Users keep custody in their wallet while the app prepares each swap transaction for review and signature.
BNB Smart Chain activity can be checked through BscScan after a transaction is submitted.

faq.q: Is Nomiswap DEX the official app?
faq.a: The official swap interface is hosted on nomiswap.io/swap. Always verify the domain before connecting a wallet.

faq.q: What wallet do I need for Nomiswap DEX?
faq.a: Use a wallet that supports BNB Smart Chain and lets you review transaction details before signing.

faq.q: Does Nomiswap DEX custody my funds?
faq.a: No seed phrase or private key should be entered into a website. Swaps are reviewed and signed from your own wallet.

faq.q: Which network is used by Nomiswap DEX?
faq.a: Nomiswap is commonly used with BNB Smart Chain tokens, so check that your wallet is on the intended network before trading.

faq.q: Is this Nomiswap DEX page financial advice?
faq.a: No. It is an educational routing page; review token contracts, liquidity, slippage, and risks before any transaction.

footer_note: This page is not the official app; verify nomiswap.io before connecting, and treat all content as educational, not financial advice.
